meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Students: Mastering User Onboarding (Intermediate Guide)
content.seo_description: Break out of the tutorial loop. Learn how to implement professional user onboarding using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first real-world SaaS.
content.answer_block: Most students fail because their apps lack a professional entry path. User onboarding transforms a chaotic script into a structured product. By implementing a guided, data-driven flow using Antigravity for architecture and Claude Code for execution, you turn 'basic apps' into professional-grade software portfolios that recruiters actually notice.
content.intro:
You’ve built the to-do list, the weather app, and the simple AI wrapper. Yet, when you look at your dashboard, it feels like a hollow shell—missing the polish that separates a weekend project from a production-ready SaaS. The silence of a new user landing on an empty, unguided interface is the graveyard of most student projects.

But the gap isn't in your coding ability; it's in your product architecture. Professional onboarding is the bridge between a 'script' and a 'solution.' By mastering the art of guiding a user through their 'Aha!' moment, you stop building features and start building experiences. It’s time to stop coding in the dark and start engineering for impact.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the exact action that provides value to your user. Onboarding should exist solely to guide them there.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my app logic and suggest a 3-step onboarding flow that drives the user to the core value proposition of my project.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'identify the primary user value and draft an onboarding state machine'

steps.title: State Management for Onboarding
steps.description: Implement a state-based system that tracks progress, ensuring users don't get stuck in tutorial loops.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean state-management structure for user onboarding using React Context or a similar pattern that persists progress.

steps.title: Progressive Disclosure UI
steps.description: Hide complex settings until the user has successfully completed the initial setup.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a UI component strategy that uses progressive disclosure to hide advanced features behind onboarding completion.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor dashboard to hide advanced settings until onboarding-complete is true'

steps.title: Data-Driven Feedback Loops
steps.description: Add subtle animations or success states that validate the user's progress during onboarding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest micro-interactions for an onboarding flow that provide satisfying feedback when a user completes a setup step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add 'add framer-motion animations to onboarding progress bars'

steps.title: Final Integration & QA
steps.description: Ensure the app gracefully handles users who skip onboarding vs. those who complete it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust test plan to verify that the onboarding flow does not block users who want to skip or return later.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'verify onboarding flow edge cases and user skip logic'

pro_tips: Never force onboarding; always offer an 'I'm an expert, skip this' button to reduce friction.
Measure the drop-off rate at each step of your onboarding using basic console logging or analytics.
Use skeletons instead of loading spinners during onboarding to keep the user engaged while data fetches.
Ensure your onboarding persists in local storage so users don't lose their place on a page refresh.
Keep your onboarding copy human-centric; focus on what the user gains, not what the app does.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding is live, deploy your app to Vercel or Netlify, share the link with our community for a peer code review, and start iterating based on real user feedback.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the blueprint to stop building 'toy apps' and start shipping real products. Don't let your code sit on a local drive gathering dust. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
